capabilities_used.evidence: 反复围绕趋势线/均线回踩做延续：如 [2026-01-31] “H1 trend as it's been perfectly respected since 89k+”; [2024-02-29] “H4 13 EMA & 60.3-60.4 tapped - let’s see now if it can rapidly reclaim H1 trend”.
均线收复/失守是他最核心的判定框架之一：多次提到 “H1 200 EMA”, “H4 200 EMA”, “D1 100 MA”, “D1 300 MA retest/deviation below”；[2024-10-31] “Hold H1 200 EMA (69.8k) + reclaim H4 trend = good”.
频繁先定义市场是否进入区间再决定打法：[2025-01-31] “small over reaction, back to ranging”; [2025-10-31] “better chances to at least chop 108/111 weekend”; [2024-10-31] “looks like repeat last week”.
他非常关注下降趋势是否被打破：[2024-06-30] “one of the best H4 downtrend break attempt since 70k”; [2025-07-31] “Was first H4 downtrend break, had to give it a shot”.

[2026-01-31] “Deviation bruv below Nov lows into reclaim is the best cope I can think of short term”; [2024-09-30] “if you have to take 62k don't just sweep it, come to daddy 59/60” 显示他常把前高前低扫流动性/假跌破再收回当作关键结构。

对假突破和失败延续很敏感：[2024-05-31] “sneaky but classic. Now rest of the plan please (greenish saturday, trappy sunday, resolution early next week)”; [2024-06-30] “Obviously hard to trust [Sunday evening-Monday NYO] moves”.
[2025-07-31] “had to give it a shot, even on reduced sized” 明确根据环境缩小仓位；其整体表述也经常把机会和仓位分开处理。
[2025-07-31] “Got stopped out trying to trade, long, PUMP”; [2024-05-31] “alerts will hit if stopped or targets” 显示止损执行是流程化的，不恋战。
[2025-01-31] “2025 doesn’t come with absurd swings and opportunities”; [2026-01-31] “Who’s bombing who on this Saturday or market decided to sepuku randomly again ?” 他把高波动当成独立 regime 来处理。
[2024-11-29] “btc consolidating in the 90s, alts sending one after the other - even dinos” 明显在观察 BTC 横盘时山寨轮动扩散。
[2026-04-11] “BTC/Gold has bottomed after 400-410 days each cycle. We are now at the 420th day” 说明他会用跨周期计时框架判断大级别位置。
[2026-04-11] “What's coming next will be a massive liquidity flow into BTC from Gold” 说明他在跟踪 BTC/Gold 相对强弱与避险资产轮动。
[2024-05-31] “D1 trend defended, D1 100 MA climbing, D1 stoch reseting (for both BTC & SPX)” 直接把 SPX 当作 BTC 交易环境的确认变量。
虽然不直接说该 seed 名称，但行为上接近：[2026-01-31] “remain patient playing bounces/gap fills”; 多次强调要等 H1/H4 结构防守/收复后再参与，而不是裸接急跌。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Multi-Timeframe Trend Ladder
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use H1/H4/D1 trendlines and key EMAs/MAs as a hierarchy: lower timeframe for trigger, higher timeframe for bias and invalidation.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用 H1/H4/D1 趋势线与关键 EMA/MA 构成分层框架：低周期负责触发，高周期负责方向与失效。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 多次出现 “H1 trend”, “H4 trend”, “D1 trend”, “H1 200 EMA”, “D1 100 MA climbing”；[2024-10-31] 甚至明确给出 H1/H4 联立条件。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Weekend Session Trap Playbook
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Treat weekend and Sunday evening price action as low-trust microstructure, often expecting traps before a clearer move around early next week or NY open.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把周末尤其周日晚间价格行为视为低可信微观结构，预期先诱骗/扫单，再在下周初或纽约开盘附近给出更可信方向。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-05-31] “greenish saturday, trappy sunday, resolution early next week”; [2024-06-30] “hard to trust [Sunday evening-Monday NYO] moves”.

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Alert-Driven Patience
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Stay mostly inactive until alerts at preplanned levels fire; avoid forcing trades between levels.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 大部分时间保持不交易，直到预设价位的 alert 触发；尽量不在区间中段强行出手。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-07-31] “Meanwhile still no alerts triggered no trades”; [2024-05-31] “alerts will hit if stopped or targets”; [2026-01-31] “receiving alerts of market tanking on its own”.

personal_quirks.quote: small over reaction, back to ranging, spot isolated trend, focus on it  litteraly business as usual if you’ve been trading this cycle
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先把噪音归类为正常波动，再回到区间/局部趋势主线，不因情绪改系统。

personal_quirks.quote: Got stopped out trying to trade, long, PUMP for the first time today. Was first H4 downtrend break, had to give it a shot, even on reduced sized.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 有结构优势时可以试错，但必须减仓，并接受被止损是交易成本。

personal_quirks.quote: The truth is that most people flexing pico bottom entries are biding the 15+ missed attempts before.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不要迷信别人晒出来的神级抄底；真实交易是多次试错后才换来一次抓到拐点。

personal_quirks.quote: the only use case of this industry is to trade it, let’s just all talk trading
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他的账号核心价值观是纯交易导向，尽量把注意力留在价格、结构和执行上。

personal_quirks.quote: Obviously hard to trust [Sunday evening-Monday NYO] moves
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 按时段给行情分级，流动性差的时段默认降低信任度与仓位。

unique_traits: 他和一般 TA 交易员的区别，不是靠复杂指标堆叠，而是把 H1/H4/D1 趋势线与 100/200 均线做成一个极其稳定的决策骨架。另一个很强的个人标签是“周末/周日晚/NYO 微观结构剧本”，他会明确给不同时段不同可信度。第三，他愿意公开承认止损、漏空、执行差，这让他的 profile 更像真实执行型交易员，而不是只发复盘截图的内容号。

high_conviction_phrases: one focus it would remain H1 trend
exact same approach as last week
had to give it a shot
best I can think of short term
low_conviction_phrases: best cope I can think of
